title: Core Technical Components of a Blockchain
description: A flowchart showing how the fundamental technical elements of a blockchain connect and interact to form the complete system.
relationships: Transactions are grouped into a Block
A Block contains a Hash of the previous block
Blocks are chained via Hashes to form the Ledger
The Network uses a Consensus Mechanism to validate new Blocks
The Ledger is replicated across the Peer-to-Peer Network
